name: spacex-daily-briefing
description: Daily investor-grade briefing on SpaceX (post-IPO ticker SPCX, merged with xAI). Live X + web search, a price-moving lens, and a tiered output: headline, TL;DR, scannable key metrics, segment watch (Starlink leads), social/video pulse, catalysts & risks, and linked sources. Anti-fabrication: states only numbers it sourced that run; informational only, not financial advice.
